title: Benjamin S. Blanchard
body: Benjamin Seaver Blanchard, Jr. (July 20, 1929 – July 11, 2019) was an American systems engineer and emeritus professor of industrial and systems engineering at Virginia Tech, who was awarded the INCOSE Pioneer Award jointly with Wolt J. Fabrycky as "practitioner, teacher, and advocate of Systems Engineering."
